subcodes.first_line: A remembrance unto him who believed in God when every doubting idolater turned away. Verily, We have announced unto all the glad-tidings of the Day of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکری لمن آمن بالله اذ اعرض عنه کل مشرک مرتاب انا بشرنا الکل بیوم الله و
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
